{{Infobox concept
| name = Foundation
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Some families can take a practitioner from [[Foundation]] to [[Jade]] in two and a half pills.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Foundation]] compound may have literacy tablets.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Foundation]] is a level of power or stage in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
